user_query: I'm planning a surprise party for my sister's birthday. Can you help me create email invitations for our friends? To ensure the emails are valid, please use the Easy Email Validation API. Additionally, I want to check if any of our friends have role accounts using the Fast Email Verifier API.

TaskList.description: Gather a list of email addresses of friends to send the invitations.
Validate the collected email addresses using the Easy Email Validation API.
Check if any of the validated email addresses have role accounts using the Fast Email Verifier API.
Create email invitations for the birthday party based on the validated emails.
Send email invitations to the friends using an email sending API.
